response.justification: While Bogdan possesses extensive software development experience and a strong background in software craftsmanship and mentoring, he critically lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience, having only a few months of professional C++ exposure. Furthermore, his experience leans heavily toward full-stack web development and application-level infrastructure rather than the low-level, large-scale cloud compute and hardware architecture required for this technical leadership role.
strengths: Strong background in software design, testing (TDD), and establishing engineering best practices.
Demonstrated passion for technical mentoring and knowledge sharing through workshops and open-source projects.
Experience with high-throughput microservices and distributed systems, such as handling millions of requests per second.
concerns: Falls significantly short of the 8-year C++ programming minimum requirement, possessing less than one year of professional experience.
Lacks deep, specialized experience building internal cloud compute platforms or working directly with low-level hardware architecture.
Most leadership experience is informal or as a startup founder, rather than operating as a dedicated Technical Lead in a large enterprise.
